top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Retreat From Record on Tech, Oil Dips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks fell alongside US equity-index futures as the AI-fueled rally that powered global equities to record highs lost momentum after a weak forecast from chipmaker Broadcom Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: Europe’s money evolves so people’s freedom to pay remains
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Germany fails to gain seat on U.N. Security Council
top_signals.summary: This is the first time that Germany, Europe's largest economy that has already served six terms, failed to get elected to the 15-member council.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
